backfill_days.description: How many days of history the first sync imports when no backfill_since date is set. Capped at 1100.

backfill_done.description: Set true after the first successful sync.

backfill_since.description: Optional absolute start date (YYYY-MM-DD) for the first import. Takes precedence over backfill_days when set.

business_id.description: Business Manager this account belongs to. Nullable.

connection_id.description: Reference to the MetaConnection whose token can read this ad account.

currency.description: Ad account currency code from Meta, for example USD

enabled.description: When false the scheduled sync skips this account.

last_success_at.description: When the sync last completed successfully for this account.

last_sync_error.description: Last sync error message. Empty when healthy.

last_sync_status.description: Short human result of the last sync.

last_synced_at.description: When the sync last attempted this account, success or failure.

supplier_id.description: Optional reference to a Supplier. Left empty when an account is connected but not yet attributed. Account-level attribution fallback; primary attribution is the campaign-level AdSpendMapping.

supplier_name.description: Denormalized supplier name snapshot for display and legacy joins.

timezone_name.description: Ad account timezone from Meta, for example America/New_York.
